message:
polish: apply interactive-visualization-creator patterns

From the validation checklist and pedagogy principles:

- renderWithEntrance(): new helper that adds CSS staggered row
  animation + motion library spring on result containers. Applied
  to 9 exhibits (stale handles, protocol, severity, forensics,
  recycling, replay, leak detection, benchmark, and more).

- ARIA labels on key interactive SVGs: region tree, outcome
  lattice, cancel state machine. Descriptive labels for screen
  readers.

- CSS result-enter animation: table rows stagger in with 50ms
  delays using the Stripe easing curve.

- focus-visible styling on outcome cards and region boxes for
  keyboard navigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
